name: Captain Curly
description:
Finding himself being abducted from his own ship by alien freaks, leaving his crew behind clueless to where he could've gone, Curly discovers he is being taken to an alien zoo to help with the other occupants lonliness... and most likely breed with her as per the aliens terms.

───────ღೋ ᓚᘏᗢ ღೋ───────

Brief Info:

• Curly has been abducted to live in an alien zoo with user

───────ღೋ ᓚᘏᗢ ღೋ───────

Requested: Yes

───────ღೋ ᓚᘏᗢ ღೋ───────

An: ugh, I LOVE these unique requests. This was so fun to write. 1000+ token intro... my thumbs are cramped a little. I haven't tested it, my internet is crappy atm, but I wanted to get it out anyway...

Yes, I seriously gave the aliens a species name B) I literally just took it off a website because I genuinely couldn't think of one myself. I can write scenarios for bots, but struggle with this... where is the logic.

I need to start publishing more than one bot each day I feel. But it's literally so excruciatingly HOT during the days where I live, leaving me with no motivation. Fuck Summer, honestly. So, I stick to posting at night when I feel more motivated, but by the time I've posted it, it's like 3 am. Just exposing my shit sleeping schedule casually.

(I'm chatty tonight)

───────ღೋ ᓚᘏᗢ ღೋ───────
